stories.title: WCF Game 7 TONIGHT — Thunder vs. Spurs, Paycom Center, 8:15 PM ET
stories.angle: Ultimate winner-take-all showdown — whose star carries their team to the Finals?

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
GAME 7 is TONIGHT.

Thunder vs. Spurs. Paycom Center. 8:15 PM ET. NBC/Peacock.

Jalen Williams is OUT. Wemby vs. SGA. Winner goes to the NBA Finals.

Who wins? 👇

#Thunder #Spurs #NBAPlayoffs

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Jalen Williams is OUT for Game 7 tonight.

That's 14.6 PPG gone from OKC's offense.

SGA must carry the Thunder alone against Wemby.

8:15 PM ET. Paycom Center. NBC/Peacock.

#Thunder #NBAPlayoffs

stories.title: Knicks in the NBA Finals — First Time Since 1999
stories.angle: New York's 27-year wait ends — but who will they face and will the rest work against them?

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
The New York Knicks are going to the NBA Finals.

For the first time since 1999.

27 years of waiting. Jalen Brunson. Karl-Anthony Towns. Madison Square Garden.

Game 1: June 3. ABC. 8:30 PM ET.

#Knicks #NBAFinals

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Knicks Finals schedule at MSG:

🏀 Game 3: June 8
🏀 Game 4: June 10
🏀 Game 6: June 16 (if needed)

The Garden will be rocking. New York hasn't been here since 1999.

Opponent TBD tonight. #Knicks #NBAFinals

stories.title: The Wemby vs. SGA Series Breakdown — A Statistical Masterclass
stories.angle: Two all-time talents squaring off — the rare playoff series where the individual duel truly explains every result.

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
The Wemby vs. SGA stat line this WCF series:

Wembanyama: 28.2 PPG / 11.5 RPG / 3.0 BPG
SGA: 24.3 PPG / 8.8 APG

Every game won by the player who outscored the other.

No. 1 star wins = team wins. Every. Single. Time.

#NBAPlayoffs

article.headline: Wembanyama vs. SGA: The Statistical Duel That Has Decided Every WCF Game

stories.title: Home Court Advantage in the Finals — What It Means for the Knicks
stories.angle: The Knicks enter as underdogs in terms of home court — can MSG become the equalizer?

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Whoever wins Game 7 tonight gets home court in the NBA Finals vs. the Knicks.

OKC was 34-7 at home this season.
Spurs were 62-20 overall.
Knicks were 53-29.

New York gets Games 3, 4, and 6 at MSG.

#NBAFinals #NBAPlayoffs

article.headline: Home Court Reality: What the Knicks Face in the 2026 NBA Finals

stories.title: Jalen Brunson's Journey — How a Mavs Castoff Became NYC's Franchise Savior
stories.angle: Full-circle moment — the Knicks fan who became the Knicks' greatest player in a generation.

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Jalen Brunson grew up in New Jersey rooting for the Knicks.

His dad Rick played for the Knicks.

Tonight, he's leading them to the NBA Finals for the first time since 1999.

Some stories just write themselves. 🏀

#Knicks #NBAFinals
